name: Sandspring Resources Ltd.
description: Sandspring Resources Ltd. was a Canadian-listed junior mining company focused on the exploration and development of mineral properties in the Republic of Guyana, South America. The company was primarily known for advancing the Toroparu Gold-Copper Project, a multi-million ounce deposit, toward large-scale production. Sandspring Resources operated as an exploration-stage entity, aiming to develop sustainable mining operations in the region's emerging gold districts. Following various corporate developments, including mergers and acquisitions, the company's assets and operations were integrated into larger mining entities, marking its transition from an independent junior explorer.
